name: book_appointment
description: Creates a confirmed appointment on the client's Google Calendar and records it in the CRM. Call this after the caller has selected a specific date and time from the available slots.

date.description: Confirmed appointment date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.

caller_name.description: Caller's full name for the calendar event title.

service_type.description: Service type for the calendar event description.

notes.description: Any notes to include in the calendar event.
